title: Modal AI Edge Platform with NVIDIA Technology
snippet: HCL Technologies announced VisionX 2.0, an upgraded multi-modal AI edge platform developed with NVIDIA technology for mission-critical industrial environments. The platform integrates advanced computer vision, vision language models, and edge-optimized generative AI using NVIDIA's physical AI computing stack including Blueprint for video search, DeepStream, Cosmos Reason VLM, and TAO. Key features include on-premises edge AI performance through NVIDIA Jetson and RTX PRO 6000 Blackwell GPUs, multi-modal AIoT engine for analyzing video, audio, LiDAR and IoT streams, and Zero-Trust edge security architecture with Dell NativeEdge deployments.

title: Nations looking at overarching AI strategy, not just one component, Nvidia exec Calista Redmond says
snippet: Calista Redmond, VP Sovereign AI at Nvidia says that nations are increasingly looking at their overarching AI story and not just one component.
